channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned Mattress, 12th July
item.description:
Exactly as title. A mattress has been dumped over the fence next to 65-96 Brenchley Gardens

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 65-95, Brenchley Gardens, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bushes obstruction, 12th July
item.description:
Can’t see cars coming from corner when crossing the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lower Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged pavement, 12th July
item.description:
Damaged pavement and kerb in Cromlix Close, Chislehurst
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cromlix Close, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed left on pavement outside 49 Walford Road, 12th July
item.description:
A large bed, mattress and drawers left outside 49 Walford Road. Were completely blocking the pavement and have damaged a vehicle parked on street in front.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walford Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On street recycling bins littering, 12th July
item.description:
Continued abuse of on street bins causing excessive litter, pests, smell and noise. Bins are ripped open, rubbish littering street and residences, causing obstacles to access.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bevenden Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sand bags and a metal frame for sign on A2, 12th July
item.description:
There is a couple of sand bags and a metal sign dumped on the roadside of the A2/M2. It is opposite 185 Rochester Drive, Bexley, DA5 1QG, however best accessed from the A2, unless you are happy to climb the short metal fence.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Halcot Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fan dumped, 12th July
item.description:
Fan dumped by 64 Little Heath. Regular occurrence of fly tipping.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Little Heath, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Caravan left in the public highway on its own, 12th July
item.description:
Caravan dumped on the public highway not attached to anything Caravan has a registration written in black marker pen on the back AY58XPC Black Renault Clio blocking it with no MOT

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ruskin Walk, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog foul, 12th July
item.description:
There is dog foul on the pavement in front of 27/28 badsworth Road Camberwell se5 0jy.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Badsworth Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More and more rubbish every day, 12th July
item.description:
It was 2 suitcases was left there then now food rubbish in the same place and nobody never clean this spot It’s disgusting.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington High Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Bench, 12th July
item.description:
Broken bench, beyond repair in green area at Eastway behind bus stop. Needs replacing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Vale, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping - again!!, 12th July
item.description:
As above

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rendlesham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household items left outside 64-66 Glengall Road, 12th July
item.description:
Household items left outside 64-66 Glengall Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Gas canisters in road, 12th July
item.description:
Gas canisters in road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tavistock Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Persistent foul smell along pavement, 12th July
item.description:
Between roughly 12 and 30 date street there is an extremely foul, persistent odour. It smells like rotting waste/decay, or sewage. It has been present for the past few days but has been getting worse.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Date Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The Chinese restaurant Hungary Hungary keeps dumping food waste on the pavement outside, 12th July
item.description:
The Chinese restaurant Hungary Hungary keeps dumping food waste on the pavement outside which is attracting foxes and rats to the area. They are just leaving the black bags on the pavement every night. They should be using bins so that wild animals aren't ripping open the bags and spreading the food waste. The smell and sight of the food waste in the mornings of food waste is unbearable.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Baylis Road, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped duvet by bin, 12th July
item.description:
This has been here since last Tuesday. Please can you remove it. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunton Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox found, 12th July
item.description:
Baby fox died in front garden possibly from heat stroke. Needs disposing. Double bagged because of flies.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Waleorde Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Different items dumped edge of road, 12th July
item.description:
There's always lots of dumping along this street. This time it's a drawer, a suitcase and a few other items

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): West Bank, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cromwell Avenue, Bromley litter bin left full at a busy weekend AS USUAL., 12th July
item.description:
Cromwell Avenue, Bromley litter bin left full at a busy weekend AS USUAL.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cromwell Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
